## Summary
<!-- 1-3 bullets describing the change and motivation. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] `pnpm -r build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (new tests added if behaviour changed)
- [ ] Added a changeset via `pnpm changeset` (if user-facing change)
- [ ] No credentials, screenshots with sensitive data, or `.env` committed
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `SKILL.md`, etc.) if relevant

## How to verify
<!-- Steps a reviewer can run locally to confirm the change. -->
